scripts.db:migrate:local:legacy:0004-0006: wrangler d1 execute reforma-casa-nova-db --local --file=./migrations/0004_service_dates.sql && wrangler d1 execute reforma-casa-nova-db --local --file=./migrations/0005_shopping_date.sql && wrangler d1 execute reforma-casa-nova-db --local --file=./migrations/0006_providers_and_payments.sql
scripts.db:seed:local: node scripts/seed.js > /tmp/reforma-seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute reforma-casa-nova-db --local --file=/tmp/reforma-seed.sql
scripts.db:seed:remote: node scripts/seed.js > /tmp/reforma-seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute reforma-casa-nova-db --remote --file=/tmp/reforma-seed.sql
scripts.setup:local: npm run db:migrate:local && npm run db:seed:local
